name: Gumball Swing Out
description: In the crazy world of Gumball everything is possible, like having to swing in an empty space to jump from mound to mound, trying to make the jumper land just above the flag, and take into account its weight and other characteristics such as wind and mood of the beans.
instructions: Simple gameplay with efficient and easy to learn controls
tags: Boys, Cartoon, Cartoon Network, Girls, Kids, Stickman, Sword
